query:
-- Check unmatched Xero billing items - group by contactName
SELECT bi.contactName, COUNT(*) as item_count, SUM(bi.lineAmount) as total_amount
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'Xero'
  AND (bi.customerExternalId IS NULL OR bi.customerExternalId = '')
  AND bi.lineAmount > 0
GROUP BY bi.contactName
ORDER BY total_amount DESC;
